narrative:
Madison Township has 1,548 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
